title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ACC Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!
